properties.displayName: Brute Force Attack - Multiple Failed Logins
properties.description: Detects more than 10 failed sign-in attempts from a single IP within 10 minutes.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), Users = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by IPAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where FailedAttempts > 10
| extend AccountCustomEntity = tostring(Users), IPCustomEntity = IPAddress

properties.displayName: Impossible Travel - Sign-in from Two Distant Locations
properties.description: Detects when a user signs in from two geographically distant locations within 1 hour.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultType == 0
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, Location, IPAddress
| order by UserPrincipalName, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend PrevLocation = prev(Location, 1), PrevUser = prev(UserPrincipalName, 1), PrevTime = prev(TimeGenerated, 1)
| where UserPrincipalName == PrevUser and Location != PrevLocation and datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, PrevTime) < 60
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, Location, PrevLocation, IPAddress

properties.displayName: Privilege Escalation - New Global Admin Added
properties.description: Alerts when a user is added to the Global Administrator role.
properties.query:
AuditLogs
| where OperationName == 'Add member to role'
| extend RoleName = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| where RoleName contains 'Global Administrator'
| extend Actor = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target = tostring(TargetResources[1].userPrincipalName)
| project TimeGenerated, Actor, Target, RoleName, CorrelationId

properties.displayName: Potential Data Exfiltration - Large Blob Download
properties.description: Detects unusually large downloads from Azure Blob Storage.
properties.query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where OperationName == 'GetBlob'
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(ResponseBodySize) by CallerIpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where TotalBytes > 1073741824
| extend IPCustomEntity = CallerIpAddress
